caption: A small audience sits in a wood-paneled room, facing a man standing at a podium who is delivering a presentation. The speaker wears a dark vest over a light-colored shirt and glasses. The audience consists of several people seen from behind, including a man in a plaid shirt, a woman in a colorful blue, red, and white garment, and others in casual attire. The room features brown blinds covering the back wall and red accent walls on the sides. A black speaker and a podium are visible on the left. In the bottom right corner of each frame, a white rectangular box contains the text "ORCA". Across the frames, the scene remains relatively static, with subtle movements as the speaker talks and the audience listens. The perspective is a steady wide shot from the back of the room, capturing the formal yet intimate setting of the talk.
